biography: Douglas Lawrence Osowski, known professionally as Mr. Lawrence, is an American animator, writer, and voice actor. He is most known for his work as a writer and voice actor for the Nickelodeon shows Rocko's Modern Life and SpongeBob SquarePants, the latter of which he has provided the voice of Plankton, Larry the Lobster and other various characters since 1999.
name: Mr. Lawrence
